notes: All 15 reps share the same characteristic strengths (correct 3-column layout, accurate label enumeration through Groq, correct v0.8.2, correct toggle-ON and red Reset) and the same characteristic omissions (none mention the ⌘N/⌘P/⌘K keyboard shortcuts, none capture the truncated x.AI last provider, none note the colored per-provider icons). No hallucinations were found in any response — the listed labels are all genuinely present. The differentiator is purely the Check for Updates button state (and, in two t0.7 reps, the secondary buttons): reps that read it as 'enabled' score 8, those reading 'disabled' score 7, and the two t0.7 reps that flag four+ extra buttons as disabled score 6. t0.7|rep3 is the only rep that gets every button state right.
